/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Mcmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/MetropolisCoupledMcmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Msg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/MultivariateBrownianMotionV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Parameter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ParameterDouble.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ParameterIntraspecificMean.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ParameterIntraspecificVarianceGibbs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ParameterMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ParameterTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/PerikymataHSPv4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/PhylogeneticModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Probability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/RandomVariable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ReadCSV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ReadTSV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/SimulateData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/TipModelV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/UserSettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/Utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/WriteTSV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/burlc.dir/BURL_coverage/main.cpp.o -o burlc
